name.description: The full name of the user, represented by a `name` object

givenName.description: The first name of the user

familyName.description: The last name of the user

emails.description: List of user emails, only primary supported and only a predefined allow list of domains are accepted.

roles.description: List of user roles, only primary supported. One of “owner”, “admin” or “employee”.

externalId.description: This identifier is generated by the SAML provider, and is used as a unique ID by the SAML provider to match against a Notarize user.

active.description: Used to indicate whether the identity is active (true) or deprovisioned (false).

parameters.name: startIndex
parameters.description: The 1-based index of the first result in the current set of list results

parameters.name: count
parameters.description: Non-negative integer. Specifies the desired maximum number of query results per page

parameters.name: filter
parameters.description: Filter by userName. e.g. userName eq "example@example.com"

name.description: The full name of the user, represented by a `name` object

givenName.description: The first name of the user

familyName.description: The last name of the user

emails.description: List of user emails, only primary supported and only a predefined allow list of domains are accepted.

roles.description: List of user roles, only primary supported. One of “owner”, “admin” or “employee”.

externalId.description: This identifier is generated by the SAML provider, and is used as a unique ID by the SAML provider to match against a Notarize user.

active.description: Used to indicate whether the identity is active (true) or deprovisioned (false).

Operations.description: Set of operations to be performed

op.description: Can be one of: add, remove, replace

path.description: Path to value in resource. Top level values ("name") and child values ("name.givenName") supported.

value.description: Can be an object, array, or string. Value may be dependent on "path"

items.example: No path specified for remove op
Can not delete only owner in organization

description.example: Unique identifier of an external identity
Configured by the admin. Primary email address only.
The name of the user, suitable for display to end-users
The active status of the User.
Set of operations to be performed

get.description: Returns a JSON structure that describes the SCIM resource operations compliance, authentication methods, and data models available.
